svg.title: DLT customer raw pipeline overview
svg.desc: Flowchart showing the overall structure of the DLT pipeline from ADLS source files to Unity Catalog raw tables

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Where are the customer source files stored in ADLS?')
sendPrompt('How does Auto Loader detect new files?')

g.text: one row per file, all vendors

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the per-source parsing work?')
sendPrompt('What expectations are checked on each file?')
sendPrompt('What does the output table look like?')
sendPrompt('What happens when an expectation fails?')
sendPrompt('How could vendor email notifications be added?')
sendPrompt('Where are the raw tables registered?')
sendPrompt('How are DLT pipeline failure notifications configured?')
